## Problem

Describe the problem you are trying to solve or the limitation you have encountered.

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed solution or feature.

## Alternatives

Describe any alternative solutions you have considered.

## Use Case

Explain the use case for this feature. How would it help your workflow?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or mockups about the feature request here.
